# highlight-text

```typescript
import { HighlightTextComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/highlight-text';
```

## API Reference

| Property | Binding name | Type | Default | Required | Transform | Description |
|----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `palette` | `palette` | `Palette \| DecorativePalette` | `'product'` | — | — | — |
